name: Barbecued Venison Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds venison steak, 1 1/2 inch thick, cut into cubes
2 green bell peppers, cut into 1 inch pieces, parboiled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the meat, mushrooms, and wine in a shallow dish. Cover and marinate for 2-3 hours in the refrigerator.
2. Remove the meat and mushrooms from the marinade.
3. Alternate vegetables and meat on skewers.
4. Grill over medium heat for 10-15 minutes or until the desired level of doneness is reached.
